:- use_module(library(clpfd)).
solve :-
    Vars = [Arnold, Bob, Alice, Eric, Peter,
        Basketball, Soccer, Tennis, Baseball, Swimming,
        Dog, Fish, Horse, Bird, Cat,
        OnePlus_9, Google_Pixel_6, Samsung_Galaxy_S21, Iphone_13, Huawei_P50,
        Black, Red, Brown, Blonde, Gray,
        Modern, Craftsman, Victorian, Ranch, Colonial],
    Vars ins 1..5,
    Names = [Arnold, Bob, Alice, Eric, Peter],
    Sports = [Basketball, Soccer, Tennis, Baseball, Swimming],
    Pets = [Dog, Fish, Horse, Bird, Cat],
    PhoneModels = [OnePlus_9, Google_Pixel_6, Samsung_Galaxy_S21, Iphone_13, Huawei_P50],
    HairColors = [Black, Red, Brown, Blonde, Gray],
    HouseStyles = [Modern, Craftsman, Victorian, Ranch, Colonial],
    all_different(Names),
    all_different(Sports),
    all_different(Pets),
    all_different(PhoneModels),
    all_different(HairColors),
    all_different(HouseStyles),

    %% Clue 1: The person who has gray hair is the person who loves tennis.
    Gray #= Tennis,

    %% Clue 2: The person in a ranch-style home is in the fourth house.
    Ranch #= 4,

    %% Clue 3: The person living in a colonial-style house is the person who loves swimming.
    Colonial #= Swimming,

    %% Clue 4: The dog owner is somewhere to the right of the person who has gray hair.
    Dog #> Gray,

    %% Clue 5: The fish enthusiast is the person who has gray hair.
    Arnold #= Fish,

    %% Clue 6: The person who has black hair is not in the fifth house.
    Black #\= 5,

    %% Clue 7: The person who uses a Samsung Galaxy S21 is the bird keeper.
    Bird #= Samsung_Galaxy_S21,

    %% Clue 8: There is one house between the fish enthusiast and the person who uses a Samsung Galaxy S21.
    abs(Arnold - Samsung_Galaxy_S21) #= 2,

    %% Clue 9: The person residing in a Victorian house is somewhere to the left of the person in a Craftsman-style house.
    Victorian #< Craftsman,

    %% Clue 10: The person who has red hair is not in the fifth house.
    Red #\= 5,

    %% Clue 11: There is one house between the person who uses a Samsung Galaxy S21 and the person who uses a Huawei P50.
    abs(Samsung_Galaxy_S21 - Huawei_P50) #= 2,

    %% Clue 12: The person who uses an iPhone 13 is the person in a Craftsman-style house.
    Iphone_13 #= Craftsman,

    %% Clue 13: Eric is the person who has red hair.
    Eric #= Red,

    %% Clue 14: The person who has red hair is not in the fourth house.
    Red #\= 4,

    %% Clue 15: The person who uses a OnePlus 9 is in the first house.
    OnePlus_9 #= 1,

    %% Clue 16: The person who loves soccer is the dog owner.
    Soccer #= Dog,

    %% Clue 17: The person who keeps horses is Bob.
    Horse #= Bob,

    %% Clue 18: Arnold is the fish enthusiast.
    Arnold #= Fish,

    %% Clue 19: The person who loves baseball is Peter.
    Baseball #= Peter,

    %% Clue 20: The person who loves soccer is in the fourth house.
    Soccer #= 4,

    %% Clue 21: The person who has blonde hair is directly left of the person who has black hair.
    Blonde #= Black - 1,

    labeling([], Vars),
    write(Vars), nl.
